name: Brewer
description: Distilling spirits was more than just a skill—it was an art passed down through generations. You've learned the secrets of fermentation, the delicate balance of flavors that can make a drink legendary. Now, you seek to craft your own legend beyond the brewery.

feats.name: Cure Aliment
feats.description: You've seen that look enough times to know how to fix it, just one swing of your brew and it's all good. As part of your **Daily Preparation**, you create a single brew that will end the following conditions, **Dazed**, **Poisoned**, or **Unconscious**.
